text.title: django-quality-queries Output Contract
text.summary: Output is a Markdown report whose YAML frontmatter validates against the JSON Schema below. Each finding pins a file, line, and a concrete fix.
text.reference: Validator script — exit 0 on pass, 1 on violation list.

section.title: JSON Schema (frontmatter of the audit report)

example.code: --- methodology: django-quality-queries target_repo: faion-net/faion-net-be endpoints_audited: 14 n_plus_one_count: 3 indexes_recommended: 2 tests_added: 5 findings: - rule_id: r1-select-related severity: error file: apps/orders/views.py line: 42 fix: "move ORM call into selectors.get_order_list(user=...) with select_related('user','shipping_address')" before_queries: 1001 after_queries: 3 ---
example.note: Valid: all required keys present, finding includes before/after counts and a concrete fix.

example.code: --- methodology: django-quality-queries target_repo: faion-net-be n_plus_one_count: -1 findings: - severity: error file: apps/orders/views.py fix: "add select_related" ---
example.note: Invalid: missing endpoints_audited / indexes_recommended / tests_added; n_plus_one_count negative; finding missing rule_id, line, before_queries, after_queries.
